nasb.text: But I would feed you with the finest of the wheat, And with honey from the rock I would satisfy you.”

esv.text: But he would feed you with the finest of the wheat, and with honey from the rock I would satisfy you.”

cnv.text: 但我必把上好的麥子給你們吃， 又用磐石裡的蜂蜜使你們飽足。”

ccb.text: 我要以上好的麦子供养我的子民， 让他们饱享磐石间的蜂蜜。”

csbs.text: 但他必给以色列吃最好的麦子，并说： “我要用磐石所出的蜂蜜使你饱足。”
